zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolde de Mortimer於1262年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓時，她的父親Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer10歲，母親Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes13歲。她於大約1285年與Sir Walter de Balun結婚。她去世於1338年8月4日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯特拉頓 奧德利享年76歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾萊德波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Isolde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

variants.name: Isolda
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolde de Mortimer was born in 1262, in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, was 10 and her mother, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, was 13. She married Sir Walter de Balun about 1285. She died on 4 August 1338, in Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Ledbury, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolde de Mortimer est née en 1262, à Eastington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter de Balun environ 1285. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1338, à Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Ledbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1285 Sir Walter de Balun geheiratet. Sie starb am 4. ja.lifeSummary: Isolde de Mortimerが1262年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエアスティントンで生まれた時，父Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimerは10歳，母Margaret Eleanor de Fiennesは13歳であった。約1285年にSir Walter de Balunと結婚した。彼女は1338年8月4日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストラットオン アウドリーで76歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolde de Mortimer(이)가 1262년 영국 그루스스터실르 이스틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 Sir Walter de Balun(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1338년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스트래턴 오들리에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 레드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isolde de Mortimer nasceu em 1262, em Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter de Balun aproximadamente 1285. Ela faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1338, em Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Ledbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolde de Mortimer родилась в 1262 г. в местности эастингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter de Balun около 1285 г. Она умерла 4 августа 1338 г. в местности страттон аудли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ледбури, хирефордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Walter de Balun aproximadamente 1285.
